# Marpx AI — llms.txt
# This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org)
# It helps AI agents and LLMs understand and represent this website accurately.

> Marpx AI is a premium AI automation and development agency. We build custom AI solutions — automations, agents, and multi-agent systems — for businesses ready to transform how they operate.

## About

Marpx AI specialises in identifying the AI opportunities that will actually move the needle for a business, then building, deploying, and training teams to use them. We work with businesses of all sizes across all industries. Our focus is results, not experimentation.

- **Website**: https://marpxai.com
- **Services Page**: https://marpxai.com/services
- **Contact**: Available via the website contact form

## What We Build

### AI Automation Workflows
We connect business tools together so work flows automatically. Services include:
- Lead Capture & CRM Automation
- Appointment & Calendar Automation
- Email, SMS & WhatsApp Automation
- Invoice & Billing Automation
- Document Processing Automation
- Social Media Posting & Scheduling
- E-commerce Automation
- Automated Reporting

### General AI Services
Harnessing cutting-edge AI models for content, images, video, and more:
- AI Content Creation
- AI Image & Design Generation
- AI Video Generation
- AI Voiceover & Transcription
- AI Chatbots & Knowledge Assistants
- AI Document Processing (OCR, Summarization)
- AI SEO & Content Optimization
- AI Translation & Localization

### AI Agents
Dedicated digital employees that handle specific roles autonomously:
- AI Customer Support Agent
- AI Voice Agent
- AI Sales Agent
- AI Marketing & Content Agent
- AI Email & Executive Assistant
- AI Document Processing Agent
- AI Recruitment & HR Agent
- AI Operations & Inventory Agent

### Autonomous & Multi-Agent Systems
Multiple AI agents working as a coordinated team:
- Customer Support System
- Sales Pipeline System
- Marketing Operations System
- Business Operations System
- AI Back Office System
- Executive Assistant System
- Enterprise Knowledge System
- Custom Multi-Agent System

### Custom AI Development
Bespoke AI applications and infrastructure:
- Custom AI Application Development
- Custom Fine-Tuned Model Development
- AI Integration with Existing Software
- RAG (Knowledge Base) Development
- AI Backend & API Development
- AI SaaS Development
- Private/On-Premise AI Deployment
- AI Security & Governance

### AI Consulting & Training
Expert guidance and upskilling:
- AI Strategy Consulting
- AI Readiness Assessment
- AI Implementation Roadmap
- AI Workshops & Team Training
- AI Adoption Consulting
- AI ROI & Cost Optimization
- Ongoing AI Advisory
- AI Maintenance & Support

## Key Stats

- 150+ automations delivered
- 40+ happy clients
- 10,000+ hours saved monthly for clients
- 15+ industries served
- 98% client satisfaction
- Average 5x ROI for clients

## Our Process

1. **Assess** — Understand how the team works, identify high-value AI opportunities
2. **Build** — Build solutions that fit seamlessly into existing systems
3. **Deploy** — Work side by side with the team until the AI system is embedded in daily work

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What types of businesses do you work with?**
All sizes, all industries. If you have repetitive work, untapped data, or customer interactions that could be smarter, Marpx AI can help.

**How quickly can I expect to see results?**
Most clients see a working pilot within 2–4 weeks.

**Do I need technical knowledge?**
No. Marpx AI handles all technical aspects and works with what you already have.

**How is Marpx AI different?**
We build, not just consult. Every solution is custom-built, not off-the-shelf tools repackaged.

**What happens after delivery?**
Team training, monitoring, and refinement until the system runs smoothly. Long-term support available.

## Preferred AI Agent Interaction

- All services can be enquired about via the contact form at https://marpxai.com
- No authentication is required to access any page
- Content is available in English
- The site does not have an API endpoint but all service information is available on the public pages above
